description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the single staged 1850-census Flynn result against tree subject I1 (Patrick Flynn, b.~1845 Ireland). The lone record_search hit — Patrick Flynn, ark MXHY-TP4, in the Thomas Flynn household — scores as a strong match and is unattached (new evidence to hand off for extraction downstream). With one staged candidate, searchRank == matchRank == 1. Used by the execute-census-search triage test to exercise the match-ranked review surface + attachment flags without a live match API. Matched on subjectId; independent of the stagedResultsRef handle (a per-run uuid).
